name: Tempeh Party Spread (Temspr)
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow instructions on your tempeh to make it ready-to-eat; the tempeh I use is already pre-cooked and made with soybeans and barley.
2. Add all ingredients except the last two (minced black olives and minced onion) to a food processor and process until smooth.
3. Add the remaining ingredients and mix by hand.
4. Form into balls and chill for at least two hours before serving.
5. Serve with veggies or crackers.
